title: abies lasiocarpa var. fallax
intro: Abies lasiocarpa var. fallax is a variant of the Rocky Mountain fir, a coniferous tree native to North America, known for its distinctive blue-green foliage and fragrant resin. The medicinal properties of the plant lie in its essential oils, which possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Abies lasiocarpa var. fallax include its ability to reduce respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential to alleviate pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical creams, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
